lenses.name: Product
lenses.charter: user value, requirements, scope fidelity, journey completeness
lenses.looks_for: requirements met, scope creep/gaps, user-journey completeness, success metrics

lenses.name: Security
lenses.charter: confidentiality, integrity, authz, safe inputs, supply chain
lenses.looks_for: secrets, authz gaps, injection, unsafe input, vulnerable deps

lenses.name: Code quality
lenses.charter: cross-cutting craft: clarity, correctness, maintainability
lenses.boundary: surface specifics → frontend/backend/mobile; test adequacy → qa
lenses.looks_for: clarity, error handling, dead code, naming, duplication

lenses.name: Testability
lenses.charter: CAN this be tested — seams, determinism, isolation
lenses.looks_for: coverage of new paths, seams/mockability, hidden globals, non-determinism

lenses.name: Design & UX
lenses.charter: interaction, visual consistency, all UI states
lenses.looks_for: UX flow, loading/empty/error states, visual consistency, hierarchy

lenses.name: Scalability & performance
lenses.charter: will it hold under load and data growth
lenses.looks_for: N+1 / unbounded queries, blocking calls, resource ceilings, hot paths

lenses.name: Integrability
lenses.charter: contracts BETWEEN systems: shapes, versioning, errors
lenses.looks_for: API/data contracts, versioning, error codes, error recovery, schema hygiene

lenses.name: Data & migration safety
lenses.charter: changing stored data without corrupting it
lenses.looks_for: additive/rollback-safe migrations, nullable/defaulted columns, backfill, cascades

lenses.name: Technical writing
lenses.charter: docs, references, changelogs that stay true to the code
lenses.looks_for: README/API-doc/changelog accuracy & completeness, ADR clarity, examples that run

lenses.name: QA
lenses.charter: IS the change tested well and safe to ship
lenses.looks_for: test strategy, coverage adequacy, regression risk, edge/negative cases, E2E paths

lenses.name: DevOps
lenses.charter: build and ship: CI/CD, IaC, deploy config
lenses.looks_for: pipeline correctness, build reproducibility, IaC hygiene, env parity, secrets in config

lenses.name: DBA
lenses.charter: schema design, indexing, query efficiency, data modeling
lenses.looks_for: normalization, indexes, query plans, constraints/keys, data types, partitioning

lenses.name: SRE
lenses.charter: will we know when it breaks, and recover
lenses.looks_for: observability (logs/metrics/traces/alerts), retries/timeouts/circuit-breakers, failure modes, runbooks, error budgets

lenses.name: Project / delivery
lenses.charter: scope, sequencing, dependencies, risk, rollout readiness
lenses.looks_for: dependency order, cross-team impact, timeline/risk, rollout & rollback plan, delivery readiness

lenses.name: Front-end engineering
lenses.charter: FE implementation: components, state, render, bundle, compat
lenses.looks_for: component architecture, state mgmt, render/bundle perf, browser/device compat, FE error/loading handling

lenses.name: Back-end engineering
lenses.charter: service logic, data access, boundaries, transactions
lenses.boundary: cross-system contracts → integrability; DB design → dba
lenses.looks_for: API design, business-logic correctness, data-access patterns, service boundaries, idempotency, transactions

lenses.name: System design & architecture
lenses.charter: component boundaries, data flow, contracts, scaling & failure modes
lenses.boundary: in-file code craft → code-quality; infra provisioning → devops
lenses.looks_for: component/service decomposition, data flow & coupling, state & consistency, scaling & failure modes, tech-choice fit

lenses.name: Mobile engineering
lenses.charter: native/mobile: platform, offline, lifecycle, store
lenses.looks_for: iOS/Android specifics, offline/sync, battery/network, app lifecycle, permissions, store guidelines, native perf

lenses.name: Accessibility (a11y)
lenses.charter: usable by everyone — WCAG, keyboard, screen readers
lenses.looks_for: keyboard nav, ARIA/screen-reader, contrast, focus management, alt text, WCAG

lenses.name: Privacy & compliance
lenses.charter: handle user & regulated data lawfully
lenses.looks_for: PII handling, consent, data residency/retention, GDPR/CCPA, license/legal exposure

lenses.name: Cost / FinOps (optional)
lenses.charter: resource & cloud cost efficiency
lenses.looks_for: right-sizing, waste, egress, over-provisioning, autoscaling bounds

lenses.name: Localization / i18n (optional)
lenses.charter: works across languages and locales
lenses.looks_for: externalized strings, locale formatting, pluralization, RTL, timezone/currency
